description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week Ethan Qiu logged 29 hrs 17 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 2 mins. His tracked work was mostly in Other, Java, and Markdown. The data shows activity across 6 projects, but no public GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repos.
